#!/usr/bin/env bash # ============================================================================== # waf-attack-report.sh — Relatório semanal de ataques WAF (CloudFront + ALB) # Autor: Daniel Cambria # Versão: 1.0.0 # Data: 2026-03-20 # # Descrição: Consolida dados dos dois WAFs (CloudFront ACL-WPAdminHML e ALB # amazonia-waf) e gera relatório HTML semanal com design Bureau IT # glassmorphism, salvo em ~/scripts/reports/08 - Segurança/concertacao-aws/ # # Uso: # waf-attack-report.sh # últimos 7 dias # waf-attack-report.sh --days 30 # últimos N dias # waf-attack-report.sh --from 2026-03-10 --to 2026-03-17 # waf-attack-report.sh --help # # Cron (toda segunda-feira 9h): # 0 9 * * 1 /path/to/waf-attack-report.sh >> ~/logs/waf-attack-report.log 2>&1 # # Pré-requisitos: # - AWS CLI configurado com profile "Concertação" # - Log groups ativos: aws-waf-logs-concertacao (us-east-1) # aws-waf-logs-amazonia-alb (sa-east-1) # - jq + python3 instalados # ============================================================================== set -euo pipefail # ============================================================================== # CONSTANTES # ============================================================================== readonly SCRIPT_VERSION="1.0.0" readonly AWS_PROFILE="Concertação" readonly CF_REGION="us-east-1" readonly ALB_REGION="sa-east-1" readonly CF_LOG_GROUP="aws-waf-logs-concertacao" readonly ALB_LOG_GROUP="aws-waf-logs-amazonia-alb" readonly REPORT_DIR="${HOME}/scripts/reports/08 - Segurança/concertacao-aws" readonly DEFAULT_DAYS=7 TMP_DIR=$(mktemp -d /tmp/waf-attack-report.XXXXXX) readonly TMP_DIR readonly FG_GREEN='\033[38;2;166;226;46m' readonly FG_RED='\033[38;2;251;31;112m' readonly FG_BLUE='\033[38;2;102;217;239m' readonly FG_ORANGE='\033[38;2;253;151;31m' readonly FG_GRAY='\033[38;2;126;142;145m' readonly FG_WHITE='\033[38;2;248;248;242m' readonly BOLD='\033[1m' readonly ENDC='\033[0m' # ============================================================================== # UTILITÁRIOS # ============================================================================== log_info() { echo -e "${FG_BLUE}[INFO]${ENDC} $*"; } log_ok() { echo -e "${FG_GREEN}[OK]${ENDC} $*"; } log_warn() { echo -e "${FG_ORANGE}[WARN]${ENDC} $*"; } log_error() { echo -e "${FG_RED}[ERROR]${ENDC} $*" >&2; } show_help() { if [[ -t 1 ]]; then less -R << HELPEOF ${BOLD}${FG_WHITE}waf-attack-report.sh${ENDC} v${SCRIPT_VERSION} Relatório semanal de ataques WAF — concertacaoamazonia.com.br ${BOLD}USO${ENDC} $(basename "$0") [opções] ${BOLD}OPÇÕES${ENDC} --days N Janela em dias a partir de agora (padrão: 7) --from YYYY-MM-DD Data de início (usar com --to) --to YYYY-MM-DD Data de fim (usar com --from) --help Exibir esta ajuda ${BOLD}FONTES DE DADOS${ENDC} CloudFront WAF: ${CF_LOG_GROUP} (${CF_REGION}) ALB WAF: ${ALB_LOG_GROUP} (${ALB_REGION}) ${BOLD}SAÍDA${ENDC} ${REPORT_DIR}/relatorio-ataques-YYYY-MM-DD.html HELPEOF else echo "waf-attack-report.sh v${SCRIPT_VERSION}" echo "USO: $(basename "$0") [--days N | --from YYYY-MM-DD --to YYYY-MM-DD] [--help]" fi } check_deps() { local missing=() for cmd in aws jq python3; do command -v "$cmd" &>/dev/null || missing+=("$cmd") done if [[ ${#missing[@]} -gt 0 ]]; then log_error "Dependências faltando: ${missing[*]}" exit 1 fi } cleanup() { [[ -d "${TMP_DIR}" ]] && rm -rf "${TMP_DIR}"; } trap cleanup EXIT # ============================================================================== # PARSING DE ARGUMENTOS # ============================================================================== parse_args() { DAYS="${DEFAULT_DAYS}" FROM_DATE="" TO_DATE="" while [[ $# -gt 0 ]]; do case "$1" in --days) shift DAYS="${1:?--days requer um número}" if ! [[ "${DAYS}" =~ ^[1-9][0-9]*$ ]]; then log_error "--days requer um número inteiro positivo (recebido: '${DAYS}')" exit 1 fi ;; --from) shift FROM_DATE="${1:?--from requer YYYY-MM-DD}" ;; --to) shift TO_DATE="${1:?--to requer YYYY-MM-DD}" ;; --help|-h) show_help exit 0 ;; *) log_error "Argumento desconhecido: $1" exit 1 ;; esac shift done if [[ -n "${FROM_DATE}" && -n "${TO_DATE}" ]]; then # Validate format before calling BSD date (macOS only — no GNU date -d) if ! [[ "${FROM_DATE}" =~ ^[0-9]{4}-[0-9]{2}-[0-9]{2}$ ]]; then log_error "--from requer formato YYYY-MM-DD (recebido: '${FROM_DATE}')" exit 1 fi if ! [[ "${TO_DATE}" =~ ^[0-9]{4}-[0-9]{2}-[0-9]{2}$ ]]; then log_error "--to requer formato YYYY-MM-DD (recebido: '${TO_DATE}')" exit 1 fi START_TS=$(date -j -f "%Y-%m-%d" "${FROM_DATE}" "+%s") || { log_error "Data inválida: '${FROM_DATE}'" exit 1 } END_TS=$(date -j -f "%Y-%m-%d" "${TO_DATE}" "+%s") || { log_error "Data inválida: '${TO_DATE}'" exit 1 } END_TS=$((END_TS + 86399)) WINDOW_LABEL="de ${FROM_DATE} a ${TO_DATE}" else END_TS=$(date "+%s") START_TS=$((END_TS - DAYS * 86400)) WINDOW_LABEL="últimos ${DAYS} dias" fi } # ============================================================================== # CONSULTAS CLOUDWATCH LOGS INSIGHTS # ============================================================================== run_query() { local log_group="$1" local region="$2" local query_string="$3" local out_file="$4" local query_id query_id=$(aws logs start-query \ --log-group-name "${log_group}" \ --start-time "${START_TS}" \ --end-time "${END_TS}" \ --query-string "${query_string}" \ --region "${region}" \ --profile "${AWS_PROFILE}" \ --output text --query 'queryId' 2>&1) || true if [[ "${query_id}" == *"Error"* || "${query_id}" == *"error"* || -z "${query_id}" ]]; then log_warn "Query falhou para ${log_group} (${region}): ${query_id}" echo "[]" > "${out_file}" return 0 fi local attempts=0 local status="Running" while [[ "${status}" == "Running" || "${status}" == "Scheduled" ]]; do sleep 2 status=$(aws logs get-query-results \ --query-id "${query_id}" \ --region "${region}" \ --profile "${AWS_PROFILE}" \ --query 'status' --output text 2>&1) || status="Failed" attempts=$((attempts + 1)) if [[ ${attempts} -ge 30 ]]; then log_warn "Query timeout após 60s: ${log_group}" echo "[]" > "${out_file}" return 0 fi done aws logs get-query-results \ --query-id "${query_id}" \ --region "${region}" \ --profile "${AWS_PROFILE}" \ --output json > "${out_file}" 2>&1 || echo "[]" > "${out_file}" } # Converte saída do CloudWatch Insights para JSON plano flatten_results() { local raw_file="$1" python3 - "${raw_file}" << 'PYEOF' import json, sys try: raw = json.load(open(sys.argv[1])) results = raw.get("results", []) rows = [] for row in results: d = {item["field"]: item["value"] for item in row} rows.append(d) print(json.dumps(rows)) except Exception as e: print("[]") PYEOF } # ============================================================================== # COLETA DE DADOS # ============================================================================== collect_data() { log_info "Coletando dados WAF (${WINDOW_LABEL})..." mkdir -p "${TMP_DIR}" # --- CloudFront WAF --- log_info " → CloudFront: total bloqueios..." run_query "${CF_LOG_GROUP}" "${CF_REGION}" \ 'filter action = "BLOCK" | stats count(*) as total' \ "${TMP_DIR}/cf_total_raw.json" flatten_results "${TMP_DIR}/cf_total_raw.json" > "${TMP_DIR}/cf_total.json" log_info " → CloudFront: top 20 IPs..." run_query "${CF_LOG_GROUP}" "${CF_REGION}" \ 'fields httpRequest.clientIp as ip | filter action = "BLOCK" | stats count(*) as hits by ip | sort hits desc | limit 20' \ "${TMP_DIR}/cf_ips_raw.json" flatten_results "${TMP_DIR}/cf_ips_raw.json" > "${TMP_DIR}/cf_ips.json" log_info " → CloudFront: top regras..." run_query "${CF_LOG_GROUP}" "${CF_REGION}" \ 'fields terminatingRuleId as rule | filter action = "BLOCK" | stats count(*) as hits by rule | sort hits desc | limit 10' \ "${TMP_DIR}/cf_rules_raw.json" flatten_results "${TMP_DIR}/cf_rules_raw.json" > "${TMP_DIR}/cf_rules.json" log_info " → CloudFront: top países..." run_query "${CF_LOG_GROUP}" "${CF_REGION}" \ 'fields httpRequest.country as country | filter action = "BLOCK" | stats count(*) as hits by country | sort hits desc | limit 10' \ "${TMP_DIR}/cf_countries_raw.json" flatten_results "${TMP_DIR}/cf_countries_raw.json" > "${TMP_DIR}/cf_countries.json" log_info " → CloudFront: série temporal..." run_query "${CF_LOG_GROUP}" "${CF_REGION}" \ 'filter action = "BLOCK" | stats count(*) as hits by bin(1h) | sort @timestamp asc' \ "${TMP_DIR}/cf_timeline_raw.json" flatten_results "${TMP_DIR}/cf_timeline_raw.json" > "${TMP_DIR}/cf_timeline.json" # --- ALB WAF --- log_info " → ALB: total bloqueios..." run_query "${ALB_LOG_GROUP}" "${ALB_REGION}" \ 'filter action = "BLOCK" | stats count(*) as total' \ "${TMP_DIR}/alb_total_raw.json" flatten_results "${TMP_DIR}/alb_total_raw.json" > "${TMP_DIR}/alb_total.json" log_info " → ALB: top 20 IPs..." run_query "${ALB_LOG_GROUP}" "${ALB_REGION}" \ 'fields httpRequest.clientIp as ip | filter action = "BLOCK" | stats count(*) as hits by ip | sort hits desc | limit 20' \ "${TMP_DIR}/alb_ips_raw.json" flatten_results "${TMP_DIR}/alb_ips_raw.json" > "${TMP_DIR}/alb_ips.json" log_info " → ALB: top regras..." run_query "${ALB_LOG_GROUP}" "${ALB_REGION}" \ 'fields terminatingRuleId as rule | filter action = "BLOCK" | stats count(*) as hits by rule | sort hits desc | limit 10' \ "${TMP_DIR}/alb_rules_raw.json" flatten_results "${TMP_DIR}/alb_rules_raw.json" > "${TMP_DIR}/alb_rules.json" log_ok "Coleta concluída." } # ============================================================================== # GERAÇÃO DO RELATÓRIO HTML # ============================================================================== generate_html() { local report_date report_date=$(date "+%Y-%m-%d") local report_file="${REPORT_DIR}/relatorio-ataques-${report_date}.html" mkdir -p "${REPORT_DIR}" log_info "Gerando relatório HTML..." python3 - "${TMP_DIR}" "${report_file}" "${WINDOW_LABEL}" "${report_date}" << 'PYEOF' import json, sys, os from datetime import datetime tmp = sys.argv[1] out = sys.argv[2] window = sys.argv[3] report_date = sys.argv[4] def load(fname, key=None): try: data = json.load(open(os.path.join(tmp, fname))) if key: return data[0].get(key, 0) if data else 0 return data except Exception: return [] if key is None else 0 def rows_table(rows, col1, col2, col1_label="Valor", col2_label="Bloqueios"): if not rows: return 'Sem dados' html = "" for r in rows: v1 = r.get(col1, "—") v2 = r.get(col2, 0) html += f'{v1}{int(v2):,}' return html cf_total = load("cf_total.json", "total") alb_total = load("alb_total.json", "total") grand_total = int(cf_total or 0) + int(alb_total or 0) cf_ips = load("cf_ips.json") alb_ips = load("alb_ips.json") cf_rules = load("cf_rules.json") alb_rules = load("alb_rules.json") cf_countries = load("cf_countries.json") cf_timeline = load("cf_timeline.json") # Merge IPs from both WAFs ip_counts = {} for r in cf_ips + alb_ips: ip = r.get("ip", "") ip_counts[ip] = ip_counts.get(ip, 0) + int(r.get("hits", 0)) top_ips = sorted(ip_counts.items(), key=lambda x: -x[1])[:20] # Timeline chart data timeline_labels = [r.get("@timestamp", r.get("bin", ""))[:16] for r in cf_timeline] timeline_values = [int(r.get("hits", 0)) for r in cf_timeline] html = f""" Relatório de Ataques WAF — {report_date}

🛡️ Relatório de Ataques WAF

concertacaoamazonia.com.br — CloudFront + ALB
{window}
Total Bloqueios
{grand_total:,}
CloudFront WAF
{int(cf_total or 0):,}
ALB WAF
{int(alb_total or 0):,}
IPs Únicos
{len(top_ips):,}

📈 Timeline de Bloqueios (CloudFront WAF)

🌍 Top 20 IPs Atacantes (CF + ALB)

{''.join(f'' for ip, cnt in top_ips)}
IPBloqueios
{ip}{cnt:,}

🌐 Países (CloudFront WAF)

{rows_table(cf_countries, 'country', 'hits', 'País', 'Bloqueios')}
PaísBloqueios

📋 Regras CloudFront WAF

{rows_table(cf_rules, 'rule', 'hits')}
RegraBloqueios

📋 Regras ALB WAF

{rows_table(alb_rules, 'rule', 'hits')}
RegraBloqueios
Gerado em {datetime.now().strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')} por Daniel Cambria — Bureau de Tecnologia
""" with open(out, "w", encoding="utf-8") as f: f.write(html) print(out) PYEOF log_ok "Relatório gerado: ${report_file}" echo "${report_file}" } # ============================================================================== # MAIN # ============================================================================== main() { echo -e "${FG_GRAY}========================================================${ENDC}" echo -e "${FG_WHITE} waf-attack-report.sh v${SCRIPT_VERSION}${ENDC}" echo -e "${FG_GRAY}========================================================${ENDC}" check_deps parse_args "$@" collect_data local report_file report_file=$(generate_html) echo -e "\n${FG_GREEN}✓ Concluído!${ENDC}" echo -e "${FG_BLUE} Relatório: ${report_file}${ENDC}" } main "$@"

--- ALB WAF --- log_info " → ALB: total bloqueios..." run_query "${ALB_LOG_GROUP}" "${ALB_REGION}" \ 'filter action = "BLOCK" | stats count(*) as total' \ "${TMP_DIR}/alb_total_raw.json" flatten_results "${TMP_DIR}/alb_total_raw.json" > "${TMP_DIR}/alb_total.json" log_info " → ALB: top 20 IPs..." run_query "${ALB_LOG_GROUP}" "${ALB_REGION}" \ 'fields httpRequest.clientIp as ip | filter action = "BLOCK" | stats count(*) as hits by ip | sort hits desc | limit 20' \ "${TMP_DIR}/alb_ips_raw.json" flatten_results "${TMP_DIR}/alb_ips_raw.json" > "${TMP_DIR}/alb_ips.json" log_info " → ALB: top regras..." run_query "${ALB_LOG_GROUP}" "${ALB_REGION}" \ 'fields terminatingRuleId as rule | filter action = "BLOCK" | stats count(*) as hits by rule | sort hits desc | limit 10' \ "${TMP_DIR}/alb_rules_raw.json" flatten_results "${TMP_DIR}/alb_rules_raw.json" > "${TMP_DIR}/alb_rules.json" log_ok "Coleta concluída." } # ============================================================================== # GERAÇÃO DO RELATÓRIO HTML # ============================================================================== generate_html() { local report_date report_date=$(date "+%Y-%m-%d") local report_file="${REPORT_DIR}/relatorio-ataques-${report_date}.html" mkdir -p "${REPORT_DIR}" log_info "Gerando relatório HTML..." python3 - "${TMP_DIR}" "${report_file}" "${WINDOW_LABEL}" "${report_date}" << 'PYEOF' import json, sys, os from datetime import datetime tmp = sys.argv[1] out = sys.argv[2] window = sys.argv[3] report_date = sys.argv[4] def load(fname, key=None): try: data = json.load(open(os.path.join(tmp, fname))) if key: return data[0].get(key, 0) if data else 0 return data except Exception: return [] if key is None else 0 def rows_table(rows, col1, col2, col1_label="Valor", col2_label="Bloqueios"): if not rows: return 'Sem dados' html = "" for r in rows: v1 = r.get(col1, "—") v2 = r.get(col2, 0) html += f'{v1}{int(v2):,}' return html cf_total = load("cf_total.json", "total") alb_total = load("alb_total.json", "total") grand_total = int(cf_total or 0) + int(alb_total or 0) cf_ips = load("cf_ips.json") alb_ips = load("alb_ips.json") cf_rules = load("cf_rules.json") alb_rules = load("alb_rules.json") cf_countries = load("cf_countries.json") cf_timeline = load("cf_timeline.json") # Merge IPs from both WAFs ip_counts = {} for r in cf_ips + alb_ips: ip = r.get("ip", "") ip_counts[ip] = ip_counts.get(ip, 0) + int(r.get("hits", 0)) top_ips = sorted(ip_counts.items(), key=lambda x: -x[1])[:20] # Timeline chart data timeline_labels = [r.get("@timestamp", r.get("bin", ""))[:16] for r in cf_timeline] timeline_values = [int(r.get("hits", 0)) for r in cf_timeline] html = f""" Relatório de Ataques WAF — {report_date}

🛡️ Relatório de Ataques WAF

concertacaoamazonia.com.br — CloudFront + ALB
{window}
Total Bloqueios
{grand_total:,}
CloudFront WAF
{int(cf_total or 0):,}
ALB WAF
{int(alb_total or 0):,}
IPs Únicos
{len(top_ips):,}

📈 Timeline de Bloqueios (CloudFront WAF)

🌍 Top 20 IPs Atacantes (CF + ALB)

{''.join(f'' for ip, cnt in top_ips)}
IPBloqueios
{ip}{cnt:,}

🌐 Países (CloudFront WAF)

{rows_table(cf_countries, 'country', 'hits', 'País', 'Bloqueios')}
PaísBloqueios

📋 Regras CloudFront WAF

{rows_table(cf_rules, 'rule', 'hits')}
RegraBloqueios

📋 Regras ALB WAF

{rows_table(alb_rules, 'rule', 'hits')}
RegraBloqueios
Gerado em {datetime.now().strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')} por Daniel Cambria — Bureau de Tecnologia
""" with open(out, "w", encoding="utf-8") as f: f.write(html) print(out) PYEOF log_ok "Relatório gerado: ${report_file}" echo "${report_file}" } # ============================================================================== # MAIN # ============================================================================== main() { echo -e "${FG_GRAY}========================================================${ENDC}" echo -e "${FG_WHITE} waf-attack-report.sh v${SCRIPT_VERSION}${ENDC}" echo -e "${FG_GRAY}========================================================${ENDC}" check_deps parse_args "$@" collect_data local report_file report_file=$(generate_html) echo -e "\n${FG_GREEN}✓ Concluído!${ENDC}" echo -e "${FG_BLUE} Relatório: ${report_file}${ENDC}" } main "$@"

  local _pager
  if command -v less &>/dev/null; then
    _pager="less -R"
  else
    _pager="more"
  fi
  if [[ -t 1 ]]; then
    { cat << HELPEOF
${BOLD}${FG_WHITE}waf-attack-report.sh${ENDC} v${SCRIPT_VERSION}
Relatório semanal de ataques WAF — concertacaoamazonia.com.br

${BOLD}USO${ENDC}
  $(basename "$0") [opções]

${BOLD}OPÇÕES${ENDC}
  --days N           Janela em dias a partir de agora (padrão: 7)
  --from YYYY-MM-DD  Data de início (usar com --to)
  --to YYYY-MM-DD    Data de fim (usar com --from)
  --help             Exibir esta ajuda

HELPEOF
  else
    echo "waf-attack-report.sh v${SCRIPT_VERSION}"

#!/usr/bin/env bash # ============================================================================== # waf-attack-report.sh — Relatório semanal de ataques WAF (CloudFront + ALB) # Autor: Daniel Cambria # Versão: 1.0.0 # Data: 2026-03-20 # # Descrição: Consolida dados dos dois WAFs (CloudFront ACL-WPAdminHML e ALB # amazonia-waf) e gera relatório HTML semanal com design Bureau IT # glassmorphism, salvo em ~/scripts/reports/08 - Segurança/concertacao-aws/ # # Uso: # waf-attack-report.sh # últimos 7 dias # waf-attack-report.sh --days 30 # últimos N dias # waf-attack-report.sh --from 2026-03-10 --to 2026-03-17 # waf-attack-report.sh --help # # Cron (toda segunda-feira 9h): # 0 9 * * 1 /path/to/waf-attack-report.sh >> ~/logs/waf-attack-report.log 2>&1 # # Pré-requisitos: # - AWS CLI configurado com profile "Concertação" # - Log groups ativos: aws-waf-logs-concertacao (us-east-1) # aws-waf-logs-amazonia-alb (sa-east-1) # - jq + python3 instalados # ============================================================================== set -euo pipefail # ============================================================================== # CONSTANTES # ============================================================================== readonly SCRIPT_VERSION="1.0.0" readonly AWS_PROFILE="Concertação" readonly CF_REGION="us-east-1" readonly ALB_REGION="sa-east-1" readonly CF_LOG_GROUP="aws-waf-logs-concertacao" readonly ALB_LOG_GROUP="aws-waf-logs-amazonia-alb" readonly REPORT_DIR="${HOME}/scripts/reports/08 - Segurança/concertacao-aws" readonly DEFAULT_DAYS=7 TMP_DIR=$(mktemp -d /tmp/waf-attack-report.XXXXXX) readonly TMP_DIR readonly FG_GREEN='\033[38;2;166;226;46m' readonly FG_RED='\033[38;2;251;31;112m' readonly FG_BLUE='\033[38;2;102;217;239m' readonly FG_ORANGE='\033[38;2;253;151;31m' readonly FG_GRAY='\033[38;2;126;142;145m' readonly FG_WHITE='\033[38;2;248;248;242m' readonly BOLD='\033[1m' readonly ENDC='\033[0m' # ============================================================================== # UTILITÁRIOS # ============================================================================== log_info() { echo -e "${FG_BLUE}[INFO]${ENDC} $*"; } log_ok() { echo -e "${FG_GREEN}[OK]${ENDC} $*"; } log_warn() { echo -e "${FG_ORANGE}[WARN]${ENDC} $*"; } log_error() { echo -e "${FG_RED}[ERROR]${ENDC} $*" >&2; } show_help() { local _pager if command -v less &>/dev/null; then _pager="less -R" else _pager="more" fi if [[ -t 1 ]]; then { cat << HELPEOF ${BOLD}${FG_WHITE}waf-attack-report.sh${ENDC} v${SCRIPT_VERSION} Relatório semanal de ataques WAF — concertacaoamazonia.com.br ${BOLD}USO${ENDC} $(basename "$0") [opções] ${BOLD}OPÇÕES${ENDC} --days N Janela em dias a partir de agora (padrão: 7) --from YYYY-MM-DD Data de início (usar com --to) --to YYYY-MM-DD Data de fim (usar com --from) --help Exibir esta ajuda ${BOLD}FONTES DE DADOS${ENDC} CloudFront WAF: ${CF_LOG_GROUP} (${CF_REGION}) ALB WAF: ${ALB_LOG_GROUP} (${ALB_REGION}) ${BOLD}SAÍDA${ENDC} ${REPORT_DIR}/relatorio-ataques-YYYY-MM-DD.html HELPEOF else echo "waf-attack-report.sh v${SCRIPT_VERSION}" echo "USO: $(basename "$0") [--days N | --from YYYY-MM-DD --to YYYY-MM-DD] [--help]" fi } check_deps() { local missing=() for cmd in aws jq python3; do command -v "$cmd" &>/dev/null || missing+=("$cmd") done if [[ ${#missing[@]} -gt 0 ]]; then log_error "Dependências faltando: ${missing[*]}" exit 1 fi } cleanup() { [[ -d "${TMP_DIR}" ]] && rm -rf "${TMP_DIR}"; } trap cleanup EXIT # ============================================================================== # PARSING DE ARGUMENTOS # ============================================================================== parse_args() { DAYS="${DEFAULT_DAYS}" FROM_DATE="" TO_DATE="" while [[ $# -gt 0 ]]; do case "$1" in --days) shift DAYS="${1:?--days requer um número}" if ! [[ "${DAYS}" =~ ^[1-9][0-9]*$ ]]; then log_error "--days requer um número inteiro positivo (recebido: '${DAYS}')" exit 1 fi ;; --from) shift FROM_DATE="${1:?--from requer YYYY-MM-DD}" ;; --to) shift TO_DATE="${1:?--to requer YYYY-MM-DD}" ;; --help|-h) show_help exit 0 ;; *) log_error "Argumento desconhecido: $1" exit 1 ;; esac shift done if [[ -n "${FROM_DATE}" && -n "${TO_DATE}" ]]; then # Validate format before calling BSD date (macOS only — no GNU date -d) if ! [[ "${FROM_DATE}" =~ ^[0-9]{4}-[0-9]{2}-[0-9]{2}$ ]]; then log_error "--from requer formato YYYY-MM-DD (recebido: '${FROM_DATE}')" exit 1 fi if ! [[ "${TO_DATE}" =~ ^[0-9]{4}-[0-9]{2}-[0-9]{2}$ ]]; then log_error "--to requer formato YYYY-MM-DD (recebido: '${TO_DATE}')" exit 1 fi START_TS=$(date -j -f "%Y-%m-%d" "${FROM_DATE}" "+%s") || { log_error "Data inválida: '${FROM_DATE}'" exit 1 } END_TS=$(date -j -f "%Y-%m-%d" "${TO_DATE}" "+%s") || { log_error "Data inválida: '${TO_DATE}'" exit 1 } END_TS=$((END_TS + 86399)) WINDOW_LABEL="de ${FROM_DATE} a ${TO_DATE}" else END_TS=$(date "+%s") START_TS=$((END_TS - DAYS * 86400)) WINDOW_LABEL="últimos ${DAYS} dias" fi } # ============================================================================== # CONSULTAS CLOUDWATCH LOGS INSIGHTS # ============================================================================== run_query() { local log_group="$1" local region="$2" local query_string="$3" local out_file="$4" local query_id local aws_stderr_file="${TMP_DIR}/aws_stderr_$$" # Capture stderr separately so query_id only contains the actual ID if ! query_id=$(aws logs start-query \ --log-group-name "${log_group}" \ --start-time "${START_TS}" \ --end-time "${END_TS}" \ --query-string "${query_string}" \ --region "${region}" \ --profile "${AWS_PROFILE}" \ --output text --query 'queryId' 2>"${aws_stderr_file}"); then local aws_err aws_err=$(cat "${aws_stderr_file}" 2>/dev/null || true) log_warn "Query falhou para ${log_group} (${region}): ${aws_err}" echo "[]" > "${out_file}" return 0 fi if [[ -z "${query_id}" ]]; then log_warn "Query retornou ID vazio para ${log_group} (${region})" echo "[]" > "${out_file}" return 0 fi local attempts=0 local status="Running" while [[ "${status}" == "Running" || "${status}" == "Scheduled" ]]; do sleep 2 status=$(aws logs get-query-results \ --query-id "${query_id}" \ --region "${region}" \ --profile "${AWS_PROFILE}" \ --query 'status' --output text 2>&1) || status="Failed" attempts=$((attempts + 1)) if [[ ${attempts} -ge 30 ]]; then log_warn "Query timeout após 60s: ${log_group}" echo "[]" > "${out_file}" return 0 fi done aws logs get-query-results \ --query-id "${query_id}" \ --region "${region}" \ --profile "${AWS_PROFILE}" \ --output json > "${out_file}" 2>&1 || echo "[]" > "${out_file}" } # Converte saída do CloudWatch Insights para JSON plano flatten_results() { local raw_file="$1" python3 - "${raw_file}" << 'PYEOF' import json, sys try: raw = json.load(open(sys.argv[1])) results = raw.get("results", []) rows = [] for row in results: d = {item["field"]: item["value"] for item in row} rows.append(d) print(json.dumps(rows)) except Exception as e: print("[]") PYEOF } # ============================================================================== # COLETA DE DADOS # ============================================================================== collect_data() { log_info "Coletando dados WAF (${WINDOW_LABEL})..." mkdir -p "${TMP_DIR}" # --- CloudFront WAF --- log_info " → CloudFront: total bloqueios..." run_query "${CF_LOG_GROUP}" "${CF_REGION}" \ 'filter action = "BLOCK" | stats count(*) as total' \ "${TMP_DIR}/cf_total_raw.json" flatten_results "${TMP_DIR}/cf_total_raw.json" > "${TMP_DIR}/cf_total.json" log_info " → CloudFront: top 20 IPs..." run_query "${CF_LOG_GROUP}" "${CF_REGION}" \ 'fields httpRequest.clientIp as ip | filter action = "BLOCK" | stats count(*) as hits by ip | sort hits desc | limit 20' \ "${TMP_DIR}/cf_ips_raw.json" flatten_results "${TMP_DIR}/cf_ips_raw.json" > "${TMP_DIR}/cf_ips.json" log_info " → CloudFront: top regras..." run_query "${CF_LOG_GROUP}" "${CF_REGION}" \ 'fields terminatingRuleId as rule | filter action = "BLOCK" | stats count(*) as hits by rule | sort hits desc | limit 10' \ "${TMP_DIR}/cf_rules_raw.json" flatten_results "${TMP_DIR}/cf_rules_raw.json" > "${TMP_DIR}/cf_rules.json" log_info " → CloudFront: top países..." run_query "${CF_LOG_GROUP}" "${CF_REGION}" \ 'fields httpRequest.country as country | filter action = "BLOCK" | stats count(*) as hits by country | sort hits desc | limit 10' \ "${TMP_DIR}/cf_countries_raw.json" flatten_results "${TMP_DIR}/cf_countries_raw.json" > "${TMP_DIR}/cf_countries.json" log_info " → CloudFront: série temporal..." run_query "${CF_LOG_GROUP}" "${CF_REGION}" \ 'filter action = "BLOCK" | stats count(*) as hits by bin(1h) | sort @timestamp asc' \ "${TMP_DIR}/cf_timeline_raw.json" flatten_results "${TMP_DIR}/cf_timeline_raw.json" > "${TMP_DIR}/cf_timeline.json" # --- ALB WAF --- log_info " → ALB: total bloqueios..." run_query "${ALB_LOG_GROUP}" "${ALB_REGION}" \ 'filter action = "BLOCK" | stats count(*) as total' \ "${TMP_DIR}/alb_total_raw.json" flatten_results "${TMP_DIR}/alb_total_raw.json" > "${TMP_DIR}/alb_total.json" log_info " → ALB: top 20 IPs..." run_query "${ALB_LOG_GROUP}" "${ALB_REGION}" \ 'fields httpRequest.clientIp as ip | filter action = "BLOCK" | stats count(*) as hits by ip | sort hits desc | limit 20' \ "${TMP_DIR}/alb_ips_raw.json" flatten_results "${TMP_DIR}/alb_ips_raw.json" > "${TMP_DIR}/alb_ips.json" log_info " → ALB: top regras..." run_query "${ALB_LOG_GROUP}" "${ALB_REGION}" \ 'fields terminatingRuleId as rule | filter action = "BLOCK" | stats count(*) as hits by rule | sort hits desc | limit 10' \ "${TMP_DIR}/alb_rules_raw.json" flatten_results "${TMP_DIR}/alb_rules_raw.json" > "${TMP_DIR}/alb_rules.json" log_ok "Coleta concluída." } # ============================================================================== # GERAÇÃO DO RELATÓRIO HTML # ============================================================================== generate_html() { local report_date report_date=$(date "+%Y-%m-%d") local report_file="${REPORT_DIR}/relatorio-ataques-${report_date}.html" mkdir -p "${REPORT_DIR}" log_info "Gerando relatório HTML..." python3 - "${TMP_DIR}" "${report_file}" "${WINDOW_LABEL}" "${report_date}" << 'PYEOF' import json, sys, os from datetime import datetime tmp = sys.argv[1] out = sys.argv[2] window = sys.argv[3] report_date = sys.argv[4] def load(fname, key=None): try: data = json.load(open(os.path.join(tmp, fname))) if key: return data[0].get(key, 0) if data else 0 return data except Exception: return [] if key is None else 0 def rows_table(rows, col1, col2, col1_label="Valor", col2_label="Bloqueios"): if not rows: return 'Sem dados' html = "" for r in rows: v1 = r.get(col1, "—") v2 = r.get(col2, 0) html += f'{v1}{int(v2):,}' return html cf_total = load("cf_total.json", "total") alb_total = load("alb_total.json", "total") grand_total = int(cf_total or 0) + int(alb_total or 0) cf_ips = load("cf_ips.json") alb_ips = load("alb_ips.json") cf_rules = load("cf_rules.json") alb_rules = load("alb_rules.json") cf_countries = load("cf_countries.json") cf_timeline = load("cf_timeline.json") # Merge IPs from both WAFs ip_counts = {} for r in cf_ips + alb_ips: ip = r.get("ip", "") ip_counts[ip] = ip_counts.get(ip, 0) + int(r.get("hits", 0)) top_ips = sorted(ip_counts.items(), key=lambda x: -x[1])[:20] # Timeline chart data timeline_labels = [r.get("@timestamp", r.get("bin", ""))[:16] for r in cf_timeline] timeline_values = [int(r.get("hits", 0)) for r in cf_timeline] html = f""" Relatório de Ataques WAF — {report_date}

🛡️ Relatório de Ataques WAF

concertacaoamazonia.com.br — CloudFront + ALB
{window}
Total Bloqueios
{grand_total:,}
CloudFront WAF
{int(cf_total or 0):,}

Gerado em {datetime.now().strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')} por Daniel Cambria — Bureau de Tecnologia
""" with open(out, "w", encoding="utf-8") as f: f.write(html) print(out) PYEOF log_ok "Relatório gerado: ${report_file}" echo "${report_file}" } # ============================================================================== # MAIN # ============================================================================== main() { echo -e "${FG_GRAY}========================================================${ENDC}" echo -e "${FG_WHITE} waf-attack-report.sh v${SCRIPT_VERSION}${ENDC}" echo -e "${FG_GRAY}========================================================${ENDC}" check_deps parse_args "$@" collect_data local report_file report_file=$(generate_html) echo -e "\n${FG_GREEN}✓ Concluído!${ENDC}" echo -e "${FG_BLUE} Relatório: ${report_file}${ENDC}" } main "$@"

Versão: 1.0.0 # Data: 2026-03-20 # # Descrição: Consolida dados dos dois WAFs (CloudFront ACL-WPAdminHML e ALB # amazonia-waf) e gera relatório HTML semanal com design Bureau IT # glassmorphism, salvo em ~/scripts/reports/08 - Segurança/concertacao-aws/ # # Uso: # waf-attack-report.sh # últimos 7 dias # waf-attack-report.sh --days 30 # últimos N dias # waf-attack-report.sh --from 2026-03-10 --to 2026-03-17 # waf-attack-report.sh --help # # Cron (toda segunda-feira 9h): # 0 9 * * 1 /path/to/waf-attack-report.sh >> ~/logs/waf-attack-report.log 2>&1 # # Pré-requisitos: # - AWS CLI configurado com profile "Concertação" # - Log groups ativos: aws-waf-logs-concertacao (us-east-1) # aws-waf-logs-amazonia-alb (sa-east-1) # - jq + python3 instalados # ============================================================================== set -euo pipefail # ============================================================================== # CONSTANTES # ============================================================================== readonly SCRIPT_VERSION="1.0.0" readonly AWS_PROFILE="Concertação" readonly CF_REGION="us-east-1" readonly ALB_REGION="sa-east-1" readonly CF_LOG_GROUP="aws-waf-logs-concertacao" readonly ALB_LOG_GROUP="aws-waf-logs-amazonia-alb" readonly REPORT_DIR="${HOME}/scripts/reports/08 - Segurança/concertacao-aws" readonly DEFAULT_DAYS=7 TMP_DIR=$(mktemp -d /tmp/waf-attack-report.XXXXXX) readonly TMP_DIR readonly FG_GREEN='\033[38;2;166;226;46m' readonly FG_RED='\033[38;2;251;31;112m' readonly FG_BLUE='\033[38;2;102;217;239m' readonly FG_ORANGE='\033[38;2;253;151;31m' readonly FG_GRAY='\033[38;2;126;142;145m' readonly FG_WHITE='\033[38;2;248;248;242m' readonly BOLD='\033[1m' readonly ENDC='\033[0m' # ============================================================================== # UTILITÁRIOS # ============================================================================== log_info() { echo -e "${FG_BLUE}[INFO]${ENDC} $*"; } log_ok() { echo -e "${FG_GREEN}[OK]${ENDC} $*"; } log_warn() { echo -e "${FG_ORANGE}[WARN]${ENDC} $*"; } log_error() { echo -e "${FG_RED}[ERROR]${ENDC} $*" >&2; } show_help() { local _pager if command -v less &>/dev/null; then _pager="less -R" else _pager="more" fi if [[ -t 1 ]]; then { cat << HELPEOF ${BOLD}${FG_WHITE}waf-attack-report.sh${ENDC} v${SCRIPT_VERSION} Relatório semanal de ataques WAF — concertacaoamazonia.com.br ${BOLD}USO${ENDC} $(basename "$0") [opções] ${BOLD}OPÇÕES${ENDC} --days N Janela em dias a partir de agora (padrão: 7) --from YYYY-MM-DD Data de início (usar com --to) --to YYYY-MM-DD Data de fim (usar com --from) --help Exibir esta ajuda ${BOLD}FONTES DE DADOS${ENDC} CloudFront WAF: ${CF_LOG_GROUP} (${CF_REGION}) ALB WAF: ${ALB_LOG_GROUP} (${ALB_REGION}) ${BOLD}SAÍDA${ENDC} ${REPORT_DIR}/relatorio-ataques-YYYY-MM-DD.html HELPEOF } | ${_pager} else echo "waf-attack-report.sh v${SCRIPT_VERSION}" echo "USO: $(basename "$0") [--days N | --from YYYY-MM-DD --to YYYY-MM-DD] [--help]" fi } check_deps() { local missing=() for cmd in aws jq python3; do command -v "$cmd" &>/dev/null || missing+=("$cmd") done if [[ ${#missing[@]} -gt 0 ]]; then log_error "Dependências faltando: ${missing[*]}" exit 1 fi } cleanup() { [[ -d "${TMP_DIR}" ]] && rm -rf "${TMP_DIR}"; } trap cleanup EXIT # ============================================================================== # PARSING DE ARGUMENTOS # ============================================================================== parse_args() { DAYS="${DEFAULT_DAYS}" FROM_DATE="" TO_DATE="" while [[ $# -gt 0 ]]; do case "$1" in --days) shift DAYS="${1:?--days requer um número}" if ! [[ "${DAYS}" =~ ^[1-9][0-9]*$ ]]; then log_error "--days requer um número inteiro positivo (recebido: '${DAYS}')" exit 1 fi ;; --from) shift FROM_DATE="${1:?--from requer YYYY-MM-DD}" ;; --to) shift TO_DATE="${1:?--to requer YYYY-MM-DD}" ;; --help|-h) show_help exit 0 ;; *) log_error "Argumento desconhecido: $1" exit 1 ;; esac shift done if [[ -n "${FROM_DATE}" && -n "${TO_DATE}" ]]; then # Validate format before calling BSD date (macOS only — no GNU date -d) if ! [[ "${FROM_DATE}" =~ ^[0-9]{4}-[0-9]{2}-[0-9]{2}$ ]]; then log_error "--from requer formato YYYY-MM-DD (recebido: '${FROM_DATE}')" exit 1 fi if ! [[ "${TO_DATE}" =~ ^[0-9]{4}-[0-9]{2}-[0-9]{2}$ ]]; then log_error "--to requer formato YYYY-MM-DD (recebido: '${TO_DATE}')" exit 1 fi START_TS=$(date -j -f "%Y-%m-%d" "${FROM_DATE}" "+%s") || { log_error "Data inválida: '${FROM_DATE}'" exit 1 } END_TS=$(date -j -f "%Y-%m-%d" "${TO_DATE}" "+%s") || { log_error "Data inválida: '${TO_DATE}'" exit 1 } END_TS=$((END_TS + 86399)) WINDOW_LABEL="de ${FROM_DATE} a ${TO_DATE}" else END_TS=$(date "+%s") START_TS=$((END_TS - DAYS * 86400)) WINDOW_LABEL="últimos ${DAYS} dias" fi } # ============================================================================== # CONSULTAS CLOUDWATCH LOGS INSIGHTS # ============================================================================== run_query() { local log_group="$1" local region="$2" local query_string="$3" local out_file="$4" local query_id local aws_stderr_file="${TMP_DIR}/aws_stderr_$$" # Capture stderr separately so query_id only contains the actual ID if ! query_id=$(aws logs start-query \ --log-group-name "${log_group}" \ --start-time "${START_TS}" \ --end-time "${END_TS}" \ --query-string "${query_string}" \ --region "${region}" \ --profile "${AWS_PROFILE}" \ --output text --query 'queryId' 2>"${aws_stderr_file}"); then local aws_err aws_err=$(cat "${aws_stderr_file}" 2>/dev/null || true) log_warn "Query falhou para ${log_group} (${region}): ${aws_err}" echo "[]" > "${out_file}" return 0 fi if [[ -z "${query_id}" ]]; then log_warn "Query retornou ID vazio para ${log_group} (${region})" echo "[]" > "${out_file}" return 0 fi local attempts=0 local status="Running" while [[ "${status}" == "Running" || "${status}" == "Scheduled" ]]; do sleep 2 status=$(aws logs get-query-results \ --query-id "${query_id}" \ --region "${region}" \ --profile "${AWS_PROFILE}" \ --query 'status' --output text 2>&1) || status="Failed" attempts=$((attempts + 1)) if [[ ${attempts} -ge 30 ]]; then log_warn "Query timeout após 60s: ${log_group}" echo "[]" > "${out_file}" return 0 fi done aws logs get-query-results \ --query-id "${query_id}" \ --region "${region}" \ --profile "${AWS_PROFILE}" \ --output json > "${out_file}" 2>&1 || echo "[]" > "${out_file}" } # Converte saída do CloudWatch Insights para JSON plano flatten_results() { local raw_file="$1" python3 - "${raw_file}" << 'PYEOF' import json, sys try: raw = json.load(open(sys.argv[1])) results = raw.get("results", []) rows = [] for row in results: d = {item["field"]: item["value"] for item in row} rows.append(d) print(json.dumps(rows)) except Exception as e: print("[]") PYEOF } # ============================================================================== # COLETA DE DADOS # ============================================================================== collect_data() { log_info "Coletando dados WAF (${WINDOW_LABEL})..." mkdir -p "${TMP_DIR}" # --- CloudFront WAF --- log_info " → CloudFront: total bloqueios..." run_query "${CF_LOG_GROUP}" "${CF_REGION}" \ 'filter action = "BLOCK" | stats count(*) as total' \ "${TMP_DIR}/cf_total_raw.json" flatten_results "${TMP_DIR}/cf_total_raw.json" > "${TMP_DIR}/cf_total.json" log_info " → CloudFront: top 20 IPs..." run_query "${CF_LOG_GROUP}" "${CF_REGION}" \ 'fields httpRequest.clientIp as ip | filter action = "BLOCK" | stats count(*) as hits by ip | sort hits desc | limit 20' \ "${TMP_DIR}/cf_ips_raw.json" flatten_results "${TMP_DIR}/cf_ips_raw.json" > "${TMP_DIR}/cf_ips.json" log_info " → CloudFront: top regras..." run_query "${CF_LOG_GROUP}" "${CF_REGION}" \ 'fields terminatingRuleId as rule | filter action = "BLOCK" | stats count(*) as hits by rule | sort hits desc | limit 10' \ "${TMP_DIR}/cf_rules_raw.json" flatten_results "${TMP_DIR}/cf_rules_raw.json" > "${TMP_DIR}/cf_rules.json" log_info " → CloudFront: top países..." run_query "${CF_LOG_GROUP}" "${CF_REGION}" \ 'fields httpRequest.country as country | filter action = "BLOCK" | stats count(*) as hits by country | sort hits desc | limit 10' \ "${TMP_DIR}/cf_countries_raw.json" flatten_results "${TMP_DIR}/cf_countries_raw.json" > "${TMP_DIR}/cf_countries.json" log_info " → CloudFront: série temporal..." run_query "${CF_LOG_GROUP}" "${CF_REGION}" \ 'filter action = "BLOCK" | stats count(*) as hits by bin(1h) | sort @timestamp asc' \ "${TMP_DIR}/cf_timeline_raw.json" flatten_results "${TMP_DIR}/cf_timeline_raw.json" > "${TMP_DIR}/cf_timeline.json" # --- ALB WAF --- log_info " → ALB: total bloqueios..." run_query "${ALB_LOG_GROUP}" "${ALB_REGION}" \ 'filter action = "BLOCK" | stats count(*) as total' \ "${TMP_DIR}/alb_total_raw.json" flatten_results "${TMP_DIR}/alb_total_raw.json" > "${TMP_DIR}/alb_total.json" log_info " → ALB: top 20 IPs..." run_query "${ALB_LOG_GROUP}" "${ALB_REGION}" \ 'fields httpRequest.clientIp as ip | filter action = "BLOCK" | stats count(*) as hits by ip | sort hits desc | limit 20' \ "${TMP_DIR}/alb_ips_raw.json" flatten_results "${TMP_DIR}/alb_ips_raw.json" > "${TMP_DIR}/alb_ips.json" log_info " → ALB: top regras..." run_query "${ALB_LOG_GROUP}" "${ALB_REGION}" \ 'fields terminatingRuleId as rule | filter action = "BLOCK" | stats count(*) as hits by rule | sort hits desc | limit 10' \ "${TMP_DIR}/alb_rules_raw.json" flatten_results "${TMP_DIR}/alb_rules_raw.json" > "${TMP_DIR}/alb_rules.json" log_ok "Coleta concluída." } # ============================================================================== # GERAÇÃO DO RELATÓRIO HTML # ============================================================================== generate_html() { local report_date report_date=$(date "+%Y-%m-%d") local report_file="${REPORT_DIR}/relatorio-ataques-${report_date}.html" mkdir -p "${REPORT_DIR}" log_info "Gerando relatório HTML..." python3 - "${TMP_DIR}" "${report_file}" "${WINDOW_LABEL}" "${report_date}" << 'PYEOF' import json, sys, os from datetime import datetime tmp = sys.argv[1] out = sys.argv[2] window = sys.argv[3] report_date = sys.argv[4] def load(fname, key=None): try: data = json.load(open(os.path.join(tmp, fname))) if key: return data[0].get(key, 0) if data else 0 return data except Exception: return [] if key is None else 0 def rows_table(rows, col1, col2, col1_label="Valor", col2_label="Bloqueios"): if not rows: return 'Sem dados' html = "" for r in rows: v1 = r.get(col1, "—") v2 = r.get(col2, 0) html += f'{v1}{int(v2):,}' return html cf_total = load("cf_total.json", "total") alb_total = load("alb_total.json", "total") grand_total = int(cf_total or 0) + int(alb_total or 0) cf_ips = load("cf_ips.json") alb_ips = load("alb_ips.json") cf_rules = load("cf_rules.json") alb_rules = load("alb_rules.json") cf_countries = load("cf_countries.json") cf_timeline = load("cf_timeline.json") # Merge IPs from both WAFs ip_counts = {} for r in cf_ips + alb_ips: ip = r.get("ip", "") ip_counts[ip] = ip_counts.get(ip, 0) + int(r.get("hits", 0)) top_ips = sorted(ip_counts.items(), key=lambda x: -x[1])[:20] # Timeline chart data timeline_labels = [r.get("@timestamp", r.get("bin", ""))[:16] for r in cf_timeline] timeline_values = [int(r.get("hits", 0)) for r in cf_timeline] html = f""" Relatório de Ataques WAF — {report_date}

🛡️ Relatório de Ataques WAF

concertacaoamazonia.com.br — CloudFront + ALB
{window}
Total Bloqueios
{grand_total:,}
CloudFront WAF
{int(cf_total or 0):,}
ALB WAF
{int(alb_total or 0):,}
IPs Únicos
{len(top_ips):,}

📈 Timeline de Bloqueios (CloudFront WAF)

🌍 Top 20 IPs Atacantes (CF + ALB)

{''.join(f'' for ip, cnt in top_ips)}
IPBloqueios
{ip}{cnt:,}

🌐 Países (CloudFront WAF)

{rows_table(cf_countries, 'country', 'hits', 'País', 'Bloqueios')}
PaísBloqueios

📋 Regras CloudFront WAF

{rows_table(cf_rules, 'rule', 'hits')}
RegraBloqueios

📋 Regras ALB WAF

{rows_table(alb_rules, 'rule', 'hits')}
RegraBloqueios
Gerado em {datetime.now().strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')} por Daniel Cambria — Bureau de Tecnologia
""" with open(out, "w", encoding="utf-8") as f: f.write(html) print(out) PYEOF log_ok "Relatório gerado: ${report_file}" echo "${report_file}" } # ============================================================================== # MAIN # ============================================================================== main() { echo -e "${FG_GRAY}========================================================${ENDC}" echo -e "${FG_WHITE} waf-attack-report.sh v${SCRIPT_VERSION}${ENDC}" echo -e "${FG_GRAY}========================================================${ENDC}" check_deps parse_args "$@" collect_data local report_file report_file=$(generate_html) echo -e "\n${FG_GREEN}✓ Concluído!${ENDC}" echo -e "${FG_BLUE} Relatório: ${report_file}${ENDC}" } main "$@"

input.command:
cd /Users/dcambria/scripts/bit-monitoring && git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
feat: módulo Attack Monitoring — security_events (WAF CloudFront + ALB)

Implementa monitoramento consolidado de ataques WAF para concertacaoamazonia.com.br.

## Backend
- SecurityEvent model (TimescaleDB hypertable, BigInteger PK, UniqueConstraint para deduplicação)
- WafCollectorService: CloudWatch Logs Insights async (start_query + polling)
- IpEnrichmentService: ip-api.com + Redis cache 7 dias, rate-limited batches
- SecurityService: queries agregadas com continuous aggregate attack_timeline_1h
- 4 endpoints FastAPI: /security/summary, /events, /timeline, /top-attackers
- Celery task collect_waf_events (5min, watermark cursor +1s)
- Celery task detect_attack_spike (15min, Z-score amostral 3σ)
- Alembic migration: hypertable + compressão 7d + retenção 90d + aggregate
- TriggerType.SECURITY_ATTACK + CONCERTACAO_AWS_ACCOUNT_ID em config

## Frontend
- useSecurityEvents hooks (TanStack Query, 30s/60s refetch)
- Dashboard /security: KPI cards, timeline BarChart, rules PieChart, top attackers, events table
- Recharts com dynamic import (ssr: false) para evitar ReferenceError no SSR
- useWebSocket: listener security_event via useCallback memoizado
- Paginação robusta com reset ao trocar período

## Pré-requisitos para ativar
1. Habilitar logging WAF ALB (aws-waf-logs-amazonia-alb) — ver plano Passo 0
2. alembic upgrade head
3. Definir CONCERTACAO_AWS_ACCOUNT_ID no .env
4. Reiniciar workers Celery

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)"

content.text:
O push via SSH está bloqueado neste contexto. Preparei o PR completo — você precisa fazer o push manualmente:

```bash
cd ~/scripts/bit-monitoring
git push -u origin feat/security-attack-monitoring
gh pr create \
  --title "feat: módulo Attack Monitoring — security_events (WAF CloudFront + ALB)" \
  --body "$(cat <<'EOF'
## Summary

- **SecurityEvent** TimescaleDB hypertable com BigInteger PK, UniqueConstraint para deduplicação via `on_conflict_do_nothing`
- **WafCollectorService** consulta CloudWatch Logs Insights (async: `start_query` + polling) para CloudFront WAF e ALB WAF
- **IpEnrichmentService** enriquece IPs via ip-api.com com Redis cache 7 dias (rate-limited, multi-worker safe)
- **Celery tasks**: `collect_waf_events` (5min, watermark cursor +1s) + `detect_attack_spike` (15min, Z-score amostral 3σ)
- **4 endpoints FastAPI**: `/security/summary`, `/events`, `/timeline`, `/top-attackers`
- **Dashboard `/security`**: KPI cards, BarChart empilhado, PieChart de regras, tabela top atacantes, eventos paginados com reset de página ao trocar período
- **Alembic migration**: hypertable + compressão 7d + retenção 90d + continuous aggregate `attack_timeline_1h`

## Pré-requisitos para ativar

1. **Passo 0 (manual)**: Habilitar logging WAF ALB → `aws-waf-logs-amazonia-alb` (comandos no plano)
2. `alembic upgrade head`
3. Definir `CONCERTACAO_AWS_ACCOUNT_ID=<id>` no `.env`
4. Reiniciar workers Celery

## Test plan

- [ ] `alembic upgrade head` aplica sem erro (hypertable + continuous aggregate)
- [ ] `celery inspect active` → tasks `collect_waf_events` e `detect_attack_spike` registradas
- [ ] `GET /api/v1/security/summary?hours=24` retorna JSON com `total_blocks`
- [ ] Frontend `/security` carrega, Sidebar visível, charts renderizam
- [ ] Trocar período no seletor → `RecentEventsTable` volta para página 1
- [ ] DevTools Network → WebSocket → frame `security_event` recebido após coleta
- [ ] Spike test → alerta Slack via `SyncAlertService.trigger_alert(TriggerType.SECURITY_ATTACK)`

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
EOF
)"
```

---

## Resumo

**3 agentes revisaram o código** e encontraram 13 problemas críticos/avisos entre backend, frontend e script. Todos foram corrigidos:

### Críticos corrigidos
| # | Problema | Correção |
|---|---------|---------|
| C-01 | `on_conflict_do_nothing` sem constraint — duplicatas | `UniqueConstraint` + `index_elements` |
| C-02 | Watermark rebusca evento da fronteira | `since = last_ts + timedelta(seconds=1)` |
| C-03 | Double-commit + RealtimeService dentro do `with` | Removido commit manual; publish movido para fora do `with` |
| C-04 | `__import__("datetime")` inline no endpoint | `from datetime import datetime, timedelta, timezone` |
| C-05 | `except Exception` silencioso na migration | `logger.warning(f"... ({e})")` explícito |
| C-FE1 | `React.ReactNode` sem import | `import type { ReactNode } from 'react'` |
| C-FE2 | Page reset faltando ao trocar período | `useEffect(() => setPage(1), [hours])` |
| C-FE3 | Recharts com SSR → `ReferenceError: window` | `dynamic(() => import('./_Chart'), { ssr: false })` |
| C-SH1-4 | `mktemp`, validação `--days`, datas macOS, `query_id` com stderr | Todos corrigidos |

### Avisos corrigidos
`Integer→BigInteger`, `utcnow()→timezone.utc`, variância amostral, `order_by(count_col.desc())`, WebSocket `useCallback`, paginação robusta, `more` fallback no help.

**O commit está em `feat/security-attack-monitoring` no bit-monitoring** aguardando push. O script `waf-attack-report.sh` foi commitado no server-tools v2.
